name: the-celestine-prophecy
description: James Redfield's The Celestine Prophecy — a spiritual adventure novel about the Nine Insights that reveal the nature of energy, synchronicity, and human evolution.
useCase: Understanding synchronicity, managing personal energy, dealing with energy vampires, following intuition, spiritual growth, conscious evolution.
knownRisks: The book's claims about energy fields and auras are not scientifically validated
The novel's premise is presented as fact — distinguish spiritual insight from literal truth
The control dramas framework can be over-applied to complex human relationships
